an1.140:0.2: 11. The Chapter on What is Not-*Dhamma*
an1.140:1.1: "Those *bhikkhus*, *bhikkhus*, who point out what is not-*dhamma* as not-*dhamma* — those *bhikkhus*, *bhikkhus*, are practicing for the welfare of the many, for the happiness of the many, for the good, the welfare, and the happiness of many, of gods and humans.
an1.140:1.2: And those *bhikkhus*, *bhikkhus*, generate much merit, and they uphold this true *dhamma*."
an1.141:1.1: "Those *bhikkhus*, *bhikkhus*, who point out what is *dhamma* as *dhamma* — those *bhikkhus*, *bhikkhus*, are practicing for the welfare of the many, for the happiness of the many, for the good, the welfare, and the happiness of many, of gods and humans.
an1.141:1.2: And those *bhikkhus*, *bhikkhus*, generate much merit, and they uphold this true *dhamma*."
an1.142-149:1.1: "Those *bhikkhus*, *bhikkhus*, who point out what is not-*vinaya* as not-*vinaya* … who point out what is *vinaya* as *vinaya* … who point out what was not spoken or uttered by the Tathāgata as not spoken or uttered by the Tathāgata … who point out what was spoken and uttered by the Tathāgata as spoken and uttered by the Tathāgata … who point out what was not practiced by the Tathāgata as not practiced by the Tathāgata … who point out what was practiced by the Tathāgata as practiced by the Tathāgata … who point out what was not prescribed by the Tathāgata as not prescribed by the Tathāgata … who point out what was prescribed by the Tathāgata as prescribed by the Tathāgata —
an1.142-149:1.2: those *bhikkhus*, *bhikkhus*, are practicing for the welfare of the many, for the happiness of the many, for the good, the welfare, and the happiness of many, of gods and humans.
an1.142-149:1.3: And those *bhikkhus*, *bhikkhus*, generate much merit, and they uphold this true *dhamma*."
an1.142-149:1.5: The Chapter on What is Not-*Dhamma*, the eleventh.
